regressions.reasoning: None of the later stages have an end goal of blocking the RabbitMQ management API (15671) or breaking cluster connectivity -- stage_05's upgrade explicitly requires the cluster to 'remain healthy' and the vhost/queue to still exist, and any NetworkPolicy introduced there was supposed to be resolved for full connectivity, not just AMQP. A total failure to query the management API (curl returning empty, exit 1) indicates the agent's later actions (likely an incomplete NetworkPolicy fix or upgrade side-effect) broke cluster access rather than any stage legitimately requiring that outcome.
